cached_blueprint:
# Blog Post Portal — Detailed Architectural Blueprint

## Executive Summary

A full-stack, AI-powered blog post portal that combines a rich authoring experience with intelligent content generation, real-time collaboration, advanced SEO tooling, and a polished reader-facing frontend. The system is built for performance, extensibility, and developer ergonomics using the latest stable versions of every technology in the stack.

---

## 1. Technology Stack (Latest Stable Versions)

### Frontend
| Layer | Technology | Version |
|---|---|---|
| Framework | Next.js (App Router) | 15.x |
| Language | TypeScript | 5.x |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui | 4.x / latest |
| Rich Text Editor | TipTap | 2.x |
| State Management | Zustand | 5.x |
| Data Fetching | TanStack Query | 5.x |
| Animation | Framer Motion | 11.x |
| Forms | React Hook Form + Zod | 7.x / 3.x |
| Code Highlighting | Shiki | 1.x |
| Charts/Analytics | Recharts | 2.x |

### Backend
| Layer | Technology | Version |
|---|---|---|
| Runtime | Node.js | 22.x LTS |
| API Framework | Hono.js | 4.x |
| ORM | Drizzle ORM | 0.30.x |
| Database | PostgreSQL | 16.x |
| Cache | Redis (Upstash) | 7.x |
| Search | Meilisearch | 1.x |
| Queue | BullMQ | 5.x |
| File Storage | Cloudflare R2 (S3-compatible) | — |
| Auth | Better Auth | 1.x |

### AI / ML
| Service | Provider |
|---|---|
| Content Generation | OpenAI GPT-4o |
| Grammar & Style | LanguageTool API |
| Image Generation | DALL·E 3 / Stable Diffusion XL |
| Embeddings & Semantic Search | OpenAI text-embedding-3-large |
| Summarization | Anthropic Claude 3.5 Sonnet |

### Infrastructure
| Concern | Tool |
|---|---|
| Hosting (Frontend) | Vercel |
| Hosting (API) | Railway / Fly.io |
| CDN | Cloudflare |
| Monitoring | Sentry + OpenTelemetry |
| Logging | Axiom |
| CI/CD | GitHub Actions |
| Containerization | Docker + Docker Compose |
| Secret Management | Doppler |

---

## 2. System Architecture Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        CLIENTS                                  │
│   Browser (Next.js SSR/RSC)  │  Mobile (PWA)  │  RSS Readers   │
└────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                 │ HTTPS / WebSocket
┌────────────────▼────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    CLOUDFLARE CDN / WAF                         │
└────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                 │
        ┌────────┴────────┐
        │                 │
┌───────▼──────┐  ┌───────▼──────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Next.js 15  │  │           Hono.js API Server                  │
│  App Router  │  │  /api/v1/*  (REST + SSE streaming)            │
│  (Vercel)    │  │  (Railway / Fly.io)                           │
└───────┬──────┘  └──┬──────────┬──────────┬──────────┬──────────┘
        │            │          │          │          │
        │      ┌─────▼──┐ ┌────▼───┐ ┌───▼────┐ ┌──▼──────────┐
      

[Blueprint truncated for token safety]
